rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.204 governs disposition of unexpended political contributions. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: At the end of the six-year period prescribed by Section 254.203, the former officeholder or candidate shall remit any unexpended political contributions to one or more of the following:
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this elections code provision.
